product_desc: Metallic cake decorating powder – various colours
risk_type:
15 May 2026

Product Description

Metallic Cake Decorating Powder In Various Colours:

  • Rose Gold
  • Fiery Copper
  • Dior Gold
  • Platinum Silver
  • Champagne Gold

The Powders Are Used To Decorate Removable Ornaments On Cakes And Are Not Supposed To Be Consumed.

Reason The Product Is Recalled

These Cake Decorating Powders May Contain Copper And Zinc Dust Which Can Be Toxic If Inhaled Or Ingested.

The Hazards To Consumers

Risk Of Serious Harm If The Powder Is Inhaled Or Ingested. An Incident Has Occurred Resulting In The Hospitalisation Of A Young Child.

If You Suspect Someone Has Inhaled Or Ingested One Of These Cake Decorating Powders:

  • Call Triple Zero (000) If The Person Is Having Any Difficulty Breathing.
  • Call The Poisons Information Centre Immediately On 13 11 26, Available 24 Hours A Day. They Can Direct You To An Appropriate Medical Facility.

What Consumers Should Do

  1. Stop Using These Products Immediately And Keep Out Of Reach Of Children.
  2. Return To The Place Of Purchase For A Full Refund.
  3. Contact Crumb Australia For Further Information About This Recall.


Contact

Crumb Australia Pty Ltd
Call: 0458 686 858
Email: Creativecakedecoratingau@Gmail.Com
Visit: Www.Creativecakedecorating.Com.Au
injury_description: 15 May 2026

product_desc: Children’s finger-painting kits
risk_type:
15 May 2026

Product Description

Children’S Finger-Painting Kits
Kits Include:

  • Round Paint Palette
  • Colouring Books

Reason The Product Is Recalled

The Finger-Painting Kits Contain Hazardous And Toxic Substances, Methanol, Ethylene Glycol And A Phthalate.

The Hazards To Consumers

Risk Of Serious Health Effects Including Death If Children Ingest The Finger-Paint. There Is A Risk Of Skin Irritation And Swollen Lymph Nodes From Contact With The Finger-Paint.

Incidents Have Occurred Overseas.

What Consumers Should Do

  1. Stop Using The Finger Paint Immediately And Keep Out Of Reach Of Children.
  2. Write “Recalled” On The Back And Lid Of The Finger-Paint Pad And Submit A Photograph Of The Marked Product To Info@Thekiddospace.Com To Receive A Full Refund.
  3. Dispose Of The Toys Once The Photograph Is Submitted In Accordance With Local Waste Disposal Requirements.
  4. Contact Thekiddospace For Further Information Relating To The Recall Or For Further Assistance.

Contact

Thekiddospace
Email: Info@Thekiddospace.Com
Visit: Https://Thekiddospace.Shop
